meaning: n.船尾,船尾楼,<俚>傻子,真实的消息vt.冲打(船尾),使精疲力尽vi.疲乏
examples: How does Roman know whales poop at the surface?
Ted, did you poop in your pants?
Some may soon come from a new source: cow poop!
Both companies have somehow beat out the Poop Cruise company Carnival, which seems to me like a no-brainer for the award this year.
Treadwell gave the seven-hundred-pound beasts such names as Mr. Chocolate and Aunt Melissa and rhapsodized over their steaming excrement, which he insisted on calling poop.
